{{Quote|Look at what's happened so far—the chances are that all we'll find on Atzerri is another message telling us to go somewhere else, to Darepp, or Babbadod, or Arat Fraca. ''Star Morning''<nowiki></nowiki>'s been all over the galactic map.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell]]|<ref name="SoL">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>}}
'''Darepp''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE-Darepp">{{CSWECite|I|166|Darepp}}</ref> located in the [[Southern Core]] portion<ref name="TEA" /> of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was located near the [[Foless Crossroads/Legends|Foless Crossroads]].<ref name="CSWE-Foless Crossroads">{{CSWECite|I|284|Foless Crossroads}}</ref>

The ''[[Star Morning]]'', a [[Koqus liner]] owned by the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] religious order, traveled to Darepp after leaving the planet [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]]. In the [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] that followed, the [[Passenger liner/Legends|starliner]] stopped at the [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] worlds [[23 Mere]], [[Yisgga]], [[New Polokia]], [[Fwiis]] and [[Babbadod]], before returning to [[Motexx]].<ref name="SoL" />
